## Checklist

- [ ] Builds clean: `xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Relay.xcodeproj -scheme Relay -configuration Release build`
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] If behavior changed: the manual is updated in **both** places — `Sources/Views/HelpView.swift` (in-app ⌘?) *and* the wiki
- [ ] Small and focused — one thing per PR
